summary: Iteration 130 testing: Admin improvements for The Doggy Company platform. All 7 test cases verified - 21/21 backend tests passed, all 4 frontend features working correctly.

details.auth_tests: PASS - All generate-image and excel-seed-status endpoints reject unauthenticated requests (401/403)
details.excel_seed_status: PASS - All pillar counts verified: food:14, play:14, social:11, adventure:10, grooming:12, learning_memory:21, health:11
details.product_generate_image: PASS - POST /api/admin/products/{id}/generate-image accessible, returns {success:true, image_url} on success, 404 for nonexistent product
details.bundle_generate_image: PASS - POST /api/admin/celebrate/bundles/{id}/generate-image accessible, returns {success:true, image_url} on success, 404 for nonexistent bundle

frontend.feature_3_product_box_media_tab: PASS - Admin > COMMERCE > Product Box > open FF-001 > Media tab > 'Generate AI' button visible with purple border (data-testid=generate-product-image-btn)
frontend.feature_4_celebrate_services_toggle: PASS - Admin > 14 PILLARS > Celebrate > Services tab > 255 services showing, each row has green rounded 'Active' button with correct green styling (rounded-full, bg-green-50 text-green-700 border-green-200)
frontend.feature_5_celebrate_services_filter: PASS - 'Active Only' filter button found, clicking changes to green 'Show All' button (filter toggles showInactive state correctly)
frontend.feature_6_bundle_generate_ai: PASS - Admin > 14 PILLARS > Celebrate > Bundles tab > Edit bundle modal shows 'Generate AI' button next to Image URL field with purple border (data-testid=generate-bundle-image-btn)

navigation_note: IMPORTANT for next testing agent: When navigating to 14 PILLARS > Celebrate, use celebrate_links[3] (bounding box x~507, y~502 before scroll). celebrate_links[2] points to PAGE CMS > Celebrate (PillarPageCMS) not CelebrateManager. The 14 PILLARS Celebrate has tabs: Requests, Partners, Products, Services, Bundles, Settings, Generate with data-testid celebrate-tab-*
critical_code_review_comments: Filter button 'Active Only' works correctly but count stays at 255 because all services in DB have is_active=true by default - this is expected behavior, not a bug

Services shown in PillarServicesTab for Celebrate include services with pillar='celebrate' AND services matching keywords (birthday, party, celebration, etc.) - the 'Assign to Celebrate' button appears for keyword-matched but not directly pillar-assigned services

Bundle list (from /api/celebrate/bundles) is the correct public endpoint - admin endpoint /api/admin/celebrate/bundles returns 404 (no admin-specific bundle listing endpoint exists, bundles are managed via CelebrateManager UI)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation to 14 PILLARS > Celebrate requires clicking celebrate_links[3] (not [2]). The Celebrate Manager has tabs: Requests, Partners, Products, Services, Bundles, Settings, Generate (data-testids: celebrate-tab-*). Services tab shows PillarServicesTab with 255 services. All new features verified: (1) Product Box Media tab Generate AI button, (2) PillarServicesTab Active/Inactive toggle per service row, (3) Active Only/Show All filter, (4) Bundle Edit modal Generate AI button.
